title: Custom Cherry Picking Based on CSV File Input
author: Opentrons
materials: p300m transfer 198 ul LB to destination columns.
p300m mix columns of DESTINATION 80 ul 5X.

steps.title: This protocol cherrypicks from source plate...
steps.instruction: This protocol cherrypicks from source plate wells specified in the first column of an input CSV file and transfers 2 ul of the well's contents to destination plate wells specified in the second column of the input CSV file. Links: * [Custom Cherrypicking json Protocol](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-06-09/cn23rrl/custom%20program.zip) * [Opentrons Protocol Designer No-Code Tool](https://designer.opentrons.com/) * [Sample CSV File](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-06-09/0y13r26/custom%20transfer.csv) This protocol is a python translation of the attached custom cherrypicking json protocol that can be downloaded from the link above (and then uploaded to the online Opentrons Protocol Designer tool). This python translation has an added feature: upload of an input CSV file to specify source and destination wells.

steps.title: p300m mix 10 columns of SOURCE 80 ul 5X
steps.instruction: p300m mix 10 columns of SOURCE 80 ul 5X.

steps.title: p20s transfer 2 ul from SOURCE...
steps.instruction: p20s transfer 2 ul from SOURCE A2, A11 and 30 custom-selected wells specified in the input CSV file to DESTINATION A2, A11, B2-B11, C2-C11, D2-D11.

steps.title: p20s transfer 2 ul from SOURCE...
steps.instruction: p20s transfer 2 ul from SOURCE 30 custom-selected wells specified in the input CSV file and H2, H11 to DESTINATION E2-E11, F2-F11, G2-G11, H2, H11.
